name: Beef & Scallop Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet until almost smoking.
2. Add garlic and beef, then scallops, to the hot oil.
3. Stir-fry the ingredients together for about 30 seconds.
4. Mix in the remaining ingredients: sliced green onion, water, fresh ginger, white pepper, and salt.
5. Continue stir-frying the beef and scallops for another 20 to 30 seconds.
